subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, untouched by change and extinction, hath ever been and shall ever be befitting and worthy of that Ever-Abiding Lord, the Most Exalted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از تغییر و زوال لم یزل و لا یزال حضرت بیزوال و غنی متعال را لایق و سزا
subcodes.subjects: @reward and punishment, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @man's distinction from the animal, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
